== Notes for [[Item:Q3534|Q3534]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diego_Fajardo_Chac%C3%B3n Wikipedia]

[https://dbe.rah.es/biografias/13109/diego-fajardo-chacon Biography]

[https://www.familysearch.org/ark:/61903/3:1:3Q9M-CS2T-8734-V Order of Santiago]

[https://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/237849 Merits]

[https://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/150551 Passenger license]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB61C781EFBBFA9822EF79916CCD6D
geni:6000000190705824830


[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
